concentration.denominator_note: share_of_pool uses fixed pool; share_of_issued uses actually issued units. Under floor remainder or caps these diverge; do not mix them.

denominator.ratio_note: This is the model-implied eligible-sats weight per unit face under full issuance approximation (T/pool). It is not a promised redemption rate, market price, or legal classification.

FC2_rebate_destroys_charity_benefit.note: rebate destruction not claimed as unconditional behavioral prediction

FC3_governance_capture_by_donation.note: FC-3 not charged against allocation mechanism alone

FC4_stolen_fund_incentive.note: laundering pathway exists but profitable laundering not unconditionally proven

FC5_timing_privileged_allocation.note: cutoff is deterministic given tip; miner influence on cutoff is residual

FC6_identity_dependency.note: caps/concavity without identity layer are Sybil-exploitable

FC7_dominated_by_simpler_mechanism.note: policy comparison; see MECHANISM_NECESSITY.md — not auto-decided here

notes: capped weights are renormalized to sum to 1.0
cap is continuous on weight, not a one-time soft suggestion
one equal nontransferable vote per recipient; not proportional to donation
token_weighted implies transferability of voting power with tokens

title: Exchange omnibus claim vs 10000 small donors
